_README.description: Brand configurations for store locator scraping
_README.usage: Select a brand, modify the URL if needed, and start scraping
_README.add_new_brand: Copy a similar 'type' configuration and update the URL and field mappings

optional_keys.display_name: Canonical human-readable brand name for the master CSV Brands column (e.g. 'BAUME & MERCIER'). If omitted, a normalized version of the config key is used.
optional_keys.custom_headers: Dict of HTTP headers injected on every request for this brand (e.g. {"Accept": "application/json"}).
optional_keys.url_base: Base URL used to reconstruct relative store-detail URLs (e.g. 'https://www.omegawatches.com/en-us').
optional_keys.use_watch_store_countries: Set to true to use comprehensive 88-country list from watch_store_countries.json
optional_keys.countries: Provide custom countries object if you want to override the comprehensive list
optional_keys.worldwide_country_pagination: If true and type is json: force country_filter strategy — iterate countries (watch_store_countries or countries) and follow offset/per pagination per country. Does not affect brands without this flag.
optional_keys.geohash_prefix_expansion: If set (object), enables geohash-prefix sharding strategy. The scraper enumerates all prefixes of prefix_length (default 2) over the geohash alphabet and fetches {url}/{prefix} for each. Keys: prefix_length (int, default 2), alphabet (str, default standard 32-char geohash), items_key (str, default 'items'), delay (float seconds between requests, default 0.15). Example: Casio locator.
optional_keys.stores_by_api_countries: Object for APIs that publish a country catalog JSON, then one store list per country id. Keys: countries_url (GET), countries_list_path (dot path to array, default "countries"), country_id_field (default "id"), country_name_field (default "name", injected on each store), stores_url_template (must include {country_id}), inject_country_name_field (default "_api_country_name"; empty string to disable). Optional radius_expansion_delay_seconds between country requests.
optional_keys.pagination_fetch_urls: Optional list of full URLs. When non-empty, the scraper GETs each URL in order, extracts the store array (data_path + standard fallbacks), merges results, and dedupes by id. Use for offset/per APIs where pages are fixed or total metadata is missing. Works with type json (runs before single_call). Optional radius_expansion_delay_seconds sets pause between requests (default 0.3s).
optional_keys.row_filters: Optional list of filter rules applied to raw store records after collection, before normalization. Each rule: { field (dot-notation path, e.g. 'extra_fields.Rank'), op (eq|in|not_in|contains, default eq), value or values }. All rules are ANDed. Absent or empty = no filtering (all other brands unaffected).
optional_keys.force_radius_multi_point: If true, always runs multi-center radius expansion when the URL (or radius_expansion_radius) supplies a distance and the URL or radius_expansion_centers supplies centers. Use when auto-detection or type=json would otherwise take a single-call path but the API is actually region-scoped.
optional_keys.radius_expansion_centers: Optional list of search centers instead of the built-in world/region city grid. Each entry: { "name": "City", "lat": 40.1, "lng": -74.0 } or [ "City", 40.1, -74.0 ]. When set, region presets do not filter this list.
optional_keys.radius_expansion_radius: Optional string or number override for the distance parameter (same units the API expects, e.g. miles).
optional_keys.radius_lat_param: Optional query key for latitude when using radius_expansion_centers without lat/long in the template URL (default "lat").
optional_keys.radius_lng_param: Optional query key for longitude in the same situation (default "long").
optional_keys.field_mapping_join: Per-field object form: {"join": ["data.street", "data.number"], "separator": " ", "skip_tokens": ["N/A"]}. Concatenates dot-path values; skips empty/N/A and drops a segment if it is a substring of an already-kept segment (avoids duplicate street lines).
optional_keys.flatten_grouped_stores: When the API returns country/region groups each holding an array of stores: {"path": "retailers.items", "list_key": "retailers"}. The scraper flattens every group's list into one array before field mapping (WordPress / grouped JSON).
optional_keys.see: COUNTRY_CONFIG_GUIDE.md for details on country configuration

rolex_retailers.description: Rolex Official Retailers API - Verified Working ✅

alange_soehne_stores.description: A. Lange & Söhne Store Locator - Single call API returns all stores ✅

alpina_stores.description: Alpina Watches Store Locator (U.S.) - Radius-based API

citizen_watch_stores.description: Citizen Watch US — Demandware Stores-FindStores. Multi-point radius expansion runs automatically; set scraper region (e.g. north_america, world) for coverage. Optional: radius_expansion_centers / radius_expansion_radius in config.

custom_json_api.description: Template: Standard JSON API - Customize URL and field mapping

shopify_store_locator.description: Template: Shopify Store Locator App - Common structure

nested_json_deep.description: Template: Deeply nested JSON - Uses dot notation for data_path

html_bootstrap_cards.description: Template: HTML page with store cards - Typical structure

wordpress_wp_store_locator.description: Template: WordPress WP Store Locator plugin

google_maps_embedded.description: Template: Site with embedded Google Maps markers

blancpain_stores.description: Blancpain Store Locator - HTML page with structured store information ✅

edox_stores.description: Edox (WordPress): admin-ajax sale_country returns HTML with .sm-block[data-latlng] dealers; locationId=-1 lists all. ✅
edox_stores._note: Scraper uses extract_stores_from_sm_block_data_latlng() for this markup. Other locationId values filter by city/region on the live site.

breitling_stores.description: Breitling (Yext): Accept: application/json; worldwide_country_pagination walks every country from watch_store_countries and all offset pages (per=50). ✅
breitling_stores._note: When use_watch_store_countries is true, scraper uses comprehensive list from watch_store_countries.json. Set to false and provide 'countries' object to use custom list.

bell_ross.description: Radius-based search API with offset pagination, returns 50 stores per page. Uses radius=2000km from Paris center point. Scraper follows all pages (offset 0, 50, 100…) and uses multiple center points worldwide to get all stores ✅
bell_ross._note: This endpoint uses radius search. When paginated (per=50&offset=0), the scraper automatically follows all pages to get every store; it also uses multiple center points worldwide when needed.

audemars_piguet.description: Paginated API - Returns stores in pages. Universal scraper will follow pagination. - Universal scraper handles pagination automatically
audemars_piguet._note: This endpoint uses pagination. The universal scraper will automatically follow all pages.

bulgari_stores.description: BULGARI store locator is fully server-side rendered (SSR). Yext powers the backend but the API key is NEVER exposed client-side - it is called server-to-server on Bulgari's infrastructure. The page is protected by an Akamai WAF that blocks Python/curl requests. No XHR calls to liveapi.yext.com are made by the browser; the store data is embedded in the 1.4MB SSR HTML response.
bulgari_stores._ssr_url_pattern: https://www.bulgari.com/en-us/storelocator/?q={lat},{lon}&qp={city_name}&l=en_US (returns up to 10 nearby stores SSR'd in HTML; need multi-point radius coverage for global scrape)
bulgari_stores._fix_option_1: Find the Yext API key: it is only accessible server-side. Check Bulgari's server logs, or ask their tech team. The key is NOT in the browser JS bundle or any client-side request.
bulgari_stores._fix_option_2: Add Playwright/Selenium browser automation support to the scraper. This would bypass the Akamai WAF and allow parsing the SSR HTML at the URL above using real Chrome. Each coordinate point returns ~10 nearest stores.
bulgari_stores._known: Yext businessId=3415321, siteId=16789. The field_mapping above matches the Yext Knowledge Graph entity structure. Confirmed: no liveapi.yext.com calls are ever made in the browser - all Yext calls are server-side.

benrus.description: Pure HTML - no API. Retailer locations rendered in page. Scraper extracts from retailer card DOM.
benrus._note: No network API - stores extracted from server-rendered HTML (retailer cards with h3, address, Google Maps link).

ball_watch.description: OpenCart store locator - country_id filters by country. 223=US. Returns JSON with stores array.
ball_watch._note: country_id uses OpenCart numeric IDs. Scraper iterates countries via country_id_map (ISO->numeric). Add more mappings as needed - IDs may vary by OpenCart install.

bomberg_watches.description: JSON API - Single call returns all stores

bremont_watches.description: JSON API - Single call returns all stores

baume_mercier.description: JSON API - Single call returns all stores

breva_stores.description: HTML page with store data - Uses data attributes for coordinates

accutron_stores.description: Radius-based search API with offset pagination, returns 50 stores per page. Uses radius=10000km from Paris center point. Scraper follows all pages (offset 0, 50, 100…) and uses multiple center points worldwide to get all stores ✅
accutron_stores._note: This endpoint uses radius search. When paginated (per=50&offset=0), the scraper automatically follows all pages to get every store; it also uses multiple center points worldwide when needed.

bulova_stores.description: Bulova (SFCC) — storefront HTML embeds map pins in data-locations. For more stores per request, use Stores-FindStores with postalCode and radius (returns JSON stores[]).

calvin_klein_stores.description: Calvin Klein US (Yext vertical search): limit=50 & offset pagination on prod-cdn.us.yextapis.com; universal scraper walks offsets until resultsCount is reached or a short page.
calvin_klein_stores._note: Public search experience key + api_key from the live locator page. verticalKey=usa-locations; ~120 US stores = three pages at limit=50.

casio_stores.description: Casio Official Store Locator — geohash-prefix sharded API. Root returns total count + empty items; stores are fetched by 2-char geohash prefix (1,024 requests). ✅

row_filters._comment: Rank 2 = official G-Shock / Casio boutiques only. Rank 10 = authorized dealers (dept stores), Rank 15 = shop-in-shop. Keeping only Rank 2 avoids merging hypermarkets, bookstores, and clothing chains into existing watch boutique records.

casio_stores._note: Country field (extra_fields.Country) is a numeric Casio country ID, not a name. batch_normalize will infer country from address. To include authorized dealers add '10' to the row_filters values list; add '15' for shop-in-shop locations.

coach_stores.description: Coach (Yext): Accept application/json; response.entities with profile.* (same shape as Breitling). pagination_fetch_urls = per=50 offsets 0, 50, 100 (~130 stores). Add URLs if count grows.

fortis_stores.description: Fortis — Storepoint JSON API (success + results.locations). Single GET returns all dealers/service centers. ✅

frederique_constant_stores.description: Frederique Constant official retailers map API — single GET returns a root JSON array; store fields live under `data.*` (city, route, lat/lng, etc.). ✅

glashuette_original_stores.description: Glashütte Original — WordPress admin-ajax get_retailers JSON; stores are nested under retailers.items[].retailers[]. Opening hours in opening_hours.*; no coordinates (geocoded in pipeline). ✅
